-----Forwarded Message-----

Dear Jeffrey,
Here is the proposal with all the informations.
It is realy great possibility for sponsor and
unfortunately the curent one is trying to abuse the
situation. He knows that is only a few day before
the shoot and that now he is the only one in the
game. I don't like when someone is trying to gain so
much on a charitable project. He will get press and
exposure. The money should go to children who needs
it! Anyhow I know it is last minute thing, I just
thougth that U mide have some idea. Thank U so much
for trying to help.
Much love P.
